message:
test(fcp-protocol): flip stale initiator-picks test to responder-picks (br-abezh)

Closes flywheel_connectors-abezh.

crates/fcp-protocol/src/session.rs:1148 shipped an inline test
`suite_negotiation_prefers_initiator_order` that asserted Suite2 wins
for initiator=[Suite2, Suite1] + responder=[Suite1, Suite2] — i.e. the
pre-crkft.2 initiator-picks semantics. This directly contradicted:

- docs/protocol/session-handshake.md:7-11 (responder-picks invariant)
- docs/protocol/session-handshake.md:77-90 (regression-suite claim)
- The sibling regression tests at session.rs:3341+3361 which assert the
  opposite (Suite1 wins) with the same inputs, and
- The inline call-site audit in
  docs/architecture/adr/crkft-call-sites.md:44 which flagged this test
  for rewrite in crkft.2.

Renamed to `suite_negotiation_prefers_responder_order`; flipped asserts
to expect Suite1 + id()==1 matching the responder-picks invariant.
Docstring cross-references the sibling regression at
`negotiate_suite_ignores_initiator_order_preference` (same inputs,
different test harness — this variant exercises the responder-picks
path through the run_logged_test structured-logging wrapper).

Cod_4 / SunnyMoose
